title: Stone Looter
description: Balanced way of improving stone drops!
body:
Stone Looter

Hello WerronPL here!

Stone Looter is a second iteration of my old datapack... it was based on commands before and was quite laggy.

Now it is Stone Looter v3 even and it comes with whole rewrite and lots of stuff as I have time to develop this pack!

Now it is made better, by using loot tables and that ensure balance and stability.

If you think that is a copy of Mine Treasure datapack... Just try it... You will see the difference.

What it offers:

  • Makes loot from stone more interesting by introducing some rewards for mining in form of chests with custom loot inside! You have to place and open them manualy tho!
  • It is compatible with silk touch and fortune
  • It is very fast and reliable.
  • Does not glich when insta-mining
  • Adds some Advancements so you can keep track of what you've found!
  • Does not require any resourcepack to work!

PS. if you feel datapack or mod version is not working correctly make sure to report any issue to my official repo on github!
